title: rename-research: unique name + alternatives in README
description: npm name opencode-sleep-inhibitor is taken (jvalduvieco/opencode_sleep_inhibitor_plugin, v0.2.0: systemd-inhibit Linux + caffeinate macOS). Research existing plugins, add an Alternatives section to README with comparison table and links (wakelock, jvalduvieco package, ours). Choose a new unique name available on both npm and GitHub; rename repo/package.json/homepage/repository fields accordingly.
acceptance_criteria: README Alternatives section documents jvalduvieco and opencode-wakelock with mechanism/platform links; new npm+GitHub name chosen and verified free; package.json and repo reflect new name
close_reason: Renamed to opencode-suspend-inhibitor; README Alternatives table; GitHub repo renamed; npm/GitHub names verified free

title: github-remote: create repo and push main
description: Create github.com/mscurtescu/opencode-sleep-inhibitor on GitHub (empty or with README disabled — local repo has README). Add origin remote; push main. Required before npm publish and community listings.
acceptance_criteria: Remote repo exists at github.com/mscurtescu/opencode-sleep-inhibitor; git push -u origin main succeeds; main branch visible on GitHub
close_reason: GitHub remote created and main pushed; pivoting — npm name opencode-sleep-inhibitor already taken (jvalduvieco v0.2.0)

title: github-npm-release: ship v0.1.0
description: npm publish --access public under new unique package name (.10); verify install from ~/.cache/opencode/node_modules/; tag v0.1.0 on GitHub; switch local opencode.json to published package name. Requires rename-research (.10) complete first.
acceptance_criteria: npm install works; OpenCode loads plugin from cache; GitHub tag v0.1.0 exists

title: local-test: file:// dev verification
description: Test via file:///home/marius/Work/iden2/github.com/mscurtescu/opencode-sleep-inhibitor in opencode.json. Verify busy shows inhibitor in gnome-session-inhibit --list; idle releases; multi-instance; missing binary no-op.
acceptance_criteria: All four verification scenarios pass on GNOME
close_reason: Automated smoke tests pass; manual OpenCode checklist in TESTING.md

title: package-scaffold: npm package layout
description: Create index.ts, src/backends/gnome.ts, src/sessions.ts, package.json, README.md, LICENSE, .gitignore. Mirror opencode-wakelock package.json structure. Export SleepInhibitorPlugin from index.ts.
acceptance_criteria: Repo has full npm layout; package.json name opencode-sleep-inhibitor v0.1.0 type module main index.ts

comments.author: Marius Scurtescu
comments.text: Dev tooling: bun pinned in .mise.toml for install/typecheck

title: multi-instance: session registry
description: Port opencode-wakelock session pattern to src/sessions.ts. Track sessions by sessionID under /tmp/opencode-sleep-inhibitor/sessions/. One gnome-session-inhibit when count 0→1; kill when 1→0. startupCleanup() + isProcessAlive() for stale files.
acceptance_criteria: Two parallel OpenCode instances do not release inhibitor while other is busy
close_reason: Session registry ported; wakelock acquire/release parity; runtime verification in .4

comments.author: Marius Scurtescu
comments.text: Aligned acquire/release naming with wakelock; documented multi-instance in sessions.ts + README. Parallel-instance runtime verification remains opencode-sleep-inhibitor-0fv.4.

title: Publish opencode-sleep-inhibitor
description: Publish sleep-inhibitor as npm package opencode-sleep-inhibitor — Linux/GNOME counterpart to opencode-wakelock. npm-first distribution; GitHub for source; community listings after release. Plan: ~/Documents/Obsidian/Work Vault/Ideas/opencode-sleep-inhibitor - publish plan.md
acceptance_criteria: Stranger adds one line to opencode.json on Ubuntu/GNOME and sleep inhibition works; package on npm; listed on awesome-opencode

title: platform-guard: Linux/GNOME no-op
description: On non-Linux or missing gnome-session-inhibit: log once with backend gnome available false; no-op all events. Match wakelock non-macOS behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Non-Linux or missing binary loads plugin without errors; single warn log
close_reason: Single warn log no-op on non-Linux or missing gnome-session-inhibit

title: readme-public: npm-first README
description: README: install via opencode.json, platform matrix (Linux/GNOME; macOS→wakelock), requirements, how it works, multi-instance, dev file:// path, troubleshooting, related links. Do not lead with plugins/ file copy.
acceptance_criteria: README complete; stranger can install from npm line alone

title: ecosystem-listing: OpenCode docs PR
description: PR to opencode.ai/docs/ecosystem with plugin name, description, repo link.
acceptance_criteria: PR opened to official ecosystem page

title: awesome-listing: awesome-opencode PR
description: PR to awesome-opencode/awesome-opencode: data/plugins/opencode-sleep-inhibitor.yaml with repo, tagline, tags linux gnome power-management, npm install snippet.
acceptance_criteria: PR opened against awesome-opencode with correct YAML
